Sharing Settings

Microsoft 365 · OneDrive & SharePoint
Step 1 of 7
Step 1 of 7
Getting started
Share your file using the blue Share button top right — click it and select 'Share'. You can also share from the file list, without even opening the file first.
💡
Remember: Share, don't send. Sharing gives you control over who sees the file and what they can do with it — even after it's been shared. You can update permissions or remove access at any time.
